line.token: * Retrieving all records from table posts
INNER JOIN tbl_users AS u ON p.post_author = u.ID
* Retrieving a single post records by it's Id
* Used for GDPR data deletion (Right to be Forgotten)
"SELECT ID FROM tbl_posts WHERE ID = ? AND post_type = 'blog'"

'

Protected with a password you choose. Only those with the password can view this post.

'
'<input type="password" class="form-control" name="post_password" value="" placeholder="Use a secure password">'

'

Protected with a password you choose. Only those with the password can view this post.

'
"SELECT ID FROM tbl_posts WHERE post_author = ? AND post_type = 'blog'"
